name: LeakyReLU(0.75)² + MTP-2 Funnel + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon + Tuned LR
author: Michael Winczuk
description: Added Multi-Token Prediction (MTP_NUM_HEADS=2, weight=0.1) as auxiliary training signal — forces backbone to learn richer representations by predicting 2 tokens ahead. MTP heads discarded at export (zero 16MB impact). Validated -0.0037 BPB improvement on test pod. Discovered via multi-agent think tank swarm research chain (8 missions + Grok + Gemini cross-validation).
